channel.title: BattleForNumber10 on LRG
channel.description: Recent content in BattleForNumber10 on LRG

item.title: Tweet - 581214971247403009
item.description:
Okay red team is coming off marginally better. Only marginally. Christ, we’re all screwed. #BattleForNumber10

❤️ 0 | 🔃 0

item.title: Tweet - 581220705360048128
item.description:
Mind you, Paxman has come off worst. He positively bullied red team in a personal way that blue team didn’t face. #BattleForNumber10

❤️ 0 | 🔃 0

item.title: Tweet - 581221864191692801
item.description:
So nobody really thinks the lib dems are even going to exist after this election, do they? #BattleForNumber10

❤️ 0 | 🔃 0
